title: The best credit cards for Airbnb rentals in July 2026: Earn points and cash back for your stay
full_text:
Best Airbnb credit cards for July 2026

Airbnb doesn't have its own credit card, but you can use certain rewards credit cards to help cover your Airbnb expenses or earn more on your stays. This could help you save money if you're a frequent Airbnb guest.

Best overall for covering Airbnb stays

Learn more Capital One Venture Rewards Credit Card Add to Compare Annual fee $95

Welcome offer Earn a one-time bonus of 75,000 miles once you spend $4,000 on purchases within 3 months from account opening, equal to $750 in travel Rewards rate 5x miles on hotels, vacation rentals, and rental cars booked through Capital One Travel 2x miles on all other purchases

Benefits Receive up to a $120 statement credit for Global Entry or TSA Precheck® application fees Receive a $50 experience credit, room upgrades, and early check-in at eligible hotels Access Hertz's Five Star membership tier, offering free upgrades, a wider selection of vehicles, and more



Why we like it: The Capital One Venture Rewards lets you redeem miles toward past travel purchases, often including Airbnb stays. This allows you to completely cover your Airbnb purchase using credit card rewards, which isn't an option on every rewards card.

Read our full Capital One Venture Rewards review

Best for flexible redemptions

Learn more Chase Sapphire Preferred® Card Add to Compare Annual fee $95

Welcome offer Earn 100,000 bonus points after you spend $5,000 on purchases in the first 3 months from account opening Rewards rate 5x points on travel purchased through Chase Travel℠ 3x points on dining, vacation homes, gas & EV charging, top streaming services, and online groceries (excluding Walmart, Target, and wholesale clubs) 2x points on all other travel purchases 1x points on all other purchases

Benefits Complimentary DashPass with $0 delivery fees & lower service fees for a min. of one year when you activate by 12/31/27, plus a $10 promo each month on non-restaurant orders Earn up to $100 in statement credits each account anniversary year for hotel stays through Chase Travel Receive one statement credit of up to $120 every four years as reimbursement for the application fee charged to your card for a Global Entry, TSA Precheck®, or NEXUS application



Why we like it: The Chase Sapphire Preferred provides 2x points on eligible Airbnb purchases, and it's easy to redeem Chase Ultimate Rewards points for Airbnb stays. You can redeem rewards for Airbnb gift cards, statement credits to cover your balance after paying for a stay, or deposits into an eligible bank account.

Read our full Chase Sapphire Preferred review

Best for cash back and flexible redemptions

Learn more Chase Freedom Unlimited® Add to Compare Annual fee $0

Welcome offer Earn a $200 bonus after you spend $500 on purchases in the first 3 months from account opening Rewards rate Enjoy 5% cash back on travel purchased through Chase Travel℠ 3% cash back on drugstore purchases and dining at restaurants (includes takeout and eligible delivery service) 1.5% on all other purchases

Benefits No minimum to redeem for cash back; use points to redeem for cash through an account statement credit or an electronic deposit into an eligible Chase account located in the U.S. Chase Credit Journey helps you monitor your credit with free access to your latest score, alerts, and more Generous intro APR on purchases and balance transfers



Why we like it: The Chase Freedom Unlimited is similar to the Sapphire Preferred in that you get the same redemption options for covering your Airbnb stay: Airbnb gift cards, statement credits, and eligible bank deposits. The difference is that this is a cash-back card with no annual fee, so it's better suited for people who prefer earning cash back over points or miles.

Read our full Chase Freedom Unlimited review

Best for elevated cash back

Learn more Citi Custom Cash® Card Annual fee $0

Welcome offer Earn $200 in cash back after spending $1,500 on purchases in the first 6 months (bonus offer will be fulfilled as 20,000 ThankYou® points, which can be redeemed for $200 cash back) Rewards rate 5% cash back on purchases in your top eligible spend category each billing cycle (up to the first $500 spent, 1% cash back after that) 4% cash back on hotels, car rentals, and attractions booked on Citi Travel℠ 1% unlimited cash back on all other purchases

Benefits No annual fee As your spending changes, your rewards adjust automatically when you spend in any of the eligible categories each billing cycle



Why we like it: The Citi Custom Cash is unique in that you can earn 5% cash back on your top eligible spending category each billing cycle on up to $500 spent. This includes select travel purchases, such as short Airbnb stays.

We say "short Airbnb stays" because stays of 28 days or longer could code as something other than travel and not be eligible for the 5% rewards rate in the travel category.

Read our full Citi Custom Cash Card review

Best for premium travel perks

Learn more Capital One Venture X Rewards Credit Card Add to Compare Annual fee $395

Welcome offer Earn 75,000 bonus miles when you spend $4,000 in the first 3 months from account opening Rewards rate 10x miles on hotels and rental cars booked through Capital One Travel 5x miles on flights and vacation rentals booked through Capital One Travel 2x miles on all other purchases

Benefits $300 annual credit for travel bookings through Capital One Travel 10,000 annual bonus miles (worth $100 in travel spending; starts on your first account anniversary) Enjoy access to 1,300+ lounges worldwide, including Capital One Lounge and Landing locations and participating Priority Pass lounges, after enrollment



Why we like it: The Capital One Venture X allows you to redeem your miles for past travel purchases, including eligible Airbnb stays. On top of that, this is a premium travel credit card with excellent perks, such as extensive airport lounge access, for frequent travelers. If you don't need the additional travel benefits, the Venture Rewards is a similar card with a lower annual fee.

Read our full Capital One Venture X review

Best for earning rewards on Airbnb stays

Learn more Citi Strata Premier® Card Annual fee $95

Welcome offer Earn 60,000 bonus points after spending $4,000 in the first 3 months (redeemable for $600 in gift cards or travel rewards on thankyou.com) Rewards rate 10x points on hotels, car rentals, and attractions (booked through CitiTravel.com) 3x points on air travel and other hotel purchases, restaurants, supermarkets, gas stations, and EV charging stations 1x points on all other purchases

Benefits Enjoy $100 off a single hotel stay of $500 or more (excluding taxes and fees) when booked through CitiTravel.com (once per calendar year; benefit applied instantly at the time of booking) No foreign transaction fees Transfer ThankYou® Points to participating airline loyalty programs — including TrueBlue®, Virgin Atlantic Flying Club, and Singapore Airlines KrisFlyer — with no fees (minimum transfer of 1,000 points)



Why we like it: The Citi Strata Premier has an elevated 3x rewards rate on many types of purchases, including multiple travel categories. This typically includes Airbnb purchases, making this an excellent card for earning flexible Citi ThankYou Points on your Airbnb stays.

More cards to consider

Learn more American Express® Gold Card Rates & fees, terms apply Add to Compare Annual fee $325

Welcome offer You may be eligible for as high as 100,000 Membership Rewards® Points after spending $8,000 in eligible purchases on your new card in your first 6 months of membership. (Welcome offers vary and you may not be eligible for an offer.)

Why we like it: The American Express Gold Card makes sense if you want to earn Amex Membership Rewards points on your eligible restaurant and grocery purchases while staying in Airbnbs. It's also an excellent card for taking advantage of multiple dining-related perks while traveling. This isn't the best card for earning rewards on Airbnb purchases or using rewards to cover Airbnb stays.

Read our full American Express Gold Card review

Learn more Chase Sapphire Reserve® Add to Compare Annual fee $795

Welcome offer Earn 100,000 bonus points after you spend $6,000 on purchases in the first 3 months from account opening

Why we like it: The Chase Sapphire Reserve has a flexible $300 annual travel credit that works for eligible Airbnb stays. All you have to do is use your card to make a qualifying travel purchase and the credit will automatically apply to your card balance. Like other Chase rewards program cards, you can use your Chase points to cover Airbnb stays through Airbnb gift cards, statement credits, and bank deposits.

Read our full Chase Sapphire Reserve review

Learn more Wells Fargo Autograph® Card Rates & fees, terms apply Annual fee $0

Welcome offer Earn 20,000 bonus points after spending $1,000 within the first 3 months (worth a $200 cash redemption value)

Introductory APR 0% intro APR on purchases for the first 12 months, 18.49%, 24.49%, or 28.49% variable APR after

Purchase APR 18.49%, 24.49%, or 28.49% variable APR Rewards rate 3x points on dining, travel, gas and EV charging stations, transit, popular streaming services, and phone plans 1x points on all other purchases

Benefits Get up to $600 of cell phone protection against damage or theft (up to two claims per year, $25 deductible applies) Auto rental collision damage waiver coverage Visa Signature® perks, including Visa Signature® Concierge service and Luxury Hotel Collection privileges



Why we like it: The Wells Fargo Autograph Card provides excellent rewards rates in many popular bonus categories that can benefit the frequent Airbnb visitor. These include 3x on restaurants, travel, gas, and transit. For a no-annual-fee card, that's hard to beat.

How do Airbnb credit cards work?

There are no specific credit cards for Airbnb, but you can use travel credit cards and cash-back credit cards to earn valuable rewards on your Airbnb purchases. For example, if a credit card earns elevated rewards on travel purchases, that should count for Airbnb stays.

Some rewards cards also provide ways to redeem your rewards to cover Airbnb expenses. Here are some potential redemption options:

Gift cards: Redeem rewards for an Airbnb gift card to add to your Airbnb account.

Statement credits: Book an Airbnb stay and redeem your rewards for a statement credit to cover some or all of the charge on your credit card.

Bank deposits: Receive a cash deposit into a qualifying bank account and use that money to book your Airbnb stay.

Cover past purchases: Similar to receiving a statement credit, some cards allow you to cover certain past purchases with rewards. So, you can book your Airbnb stay and later redeem your rewards to cover the purchase.

Note that using statement credits and covering past purchases requires you to make the Airbnb purchase first and then later use rewards to cover the cost. An advantage to these methods is that you will typically also earn rewards for booking the stay with your card.

What to look for in an Airbnb credit card

Consider these questions as you compare credit cards to use for Airbnb:

Does it earn rewards on Airbnb purchases? For credit card rewards rates, Airbnb stays typically code as travel. That means if a card earns a higher rate on travel purchases, it should work for Airbnb.

Can you redeem rewards for Airbnb stays? Most rewards credit cards have redemption options that can work for Airbnb stays. That could include gift cards, statement credits, covering past purchases, and deposits into bank accounts. However, not every rewards card offers the best redemption value for each option. You want to aim for at least a 1 cent per point redemption value, or 100 points equaling $1.

Does it have any fees to worry about? The two main fees to consider are annual fees and foreign transaction fees. Whether you should pay an annual fee often depends on how much value you can get from a card's benefits. Getting a card with no foreign transaction fees only matters if you plan to travel internationally.

Is there a welcome bonus? While not the most important aspect of opening a card for frequent Airbnb stays, earning a welcome bonus can be a quick way to earn a lot of points, miles, or cash back in a short period. Paying for an Airbnb could be a straightforward way to meet a sign-up bonus spending requirement.

Should I open a credit card for Airbnb?

A general travel credit card makes sense if you often use Airbnb on your travels. This type of card can help you earn more rewards on your Airbnb purchases, and you might also be able to redeem rewards to cover your stays.

Even better, a general travel card can help you save money on other travel expenses, such as flights and rental cars. Similar to their use for Airbnb, you can also earn rewards on and redeem rewards toward other travel purchases.

Tips and tricks for using Airbnb

Earn credit card rewards on your stay

One of the main ways to save some money on Airbnb is to make sure you earn rewards on your stays. With a rewards credit card that earns on travel purchases, you can quickly start racking up points or miles on your Airbnb bookings.

Use rewards to cover your stay

Consider covering your next Airbnb stay with credit card rewards to maximize your rewards. If your rewards credit card has redemption options like gift cards, statement credits, or bank deposits, you can typically cover some or all of your Airbnb cost.

Book through an airline loyalty program portal

Booking through an airline shopping portal is an easy way to earn more rewards on Airbnb stays. For example, British Airways and Delta have partnerships with Airbnb to offer free ways to earn points or miles on each eligible booking.

When you're redirected to the Airbnb website, you can complete your booking by entering your applicable membership number through the rewards portal and completing it as normal.

Purchase discounted gift cards

You can often find gift card sales and discounted gift cards through online retailers at different times of the year. The holidays are an especially good time for discounts on certain gift cards. With Airbnb, you can purchase a gift card from any eligible retailer and then add the card to your account. Gift card funds never expire.

Book early

Hosts can offer early bird discounts for making a reservation a certain amount of time in advance. This is an optional discount each host can choose to provide, and the amount of advance time needed for the discount can vary.

Ask for a discount

It never hurts to ask, right? This mentality can save you money if you message a host before a stay to see if discounts are available.

Book longer stays

Airbnb hosts can offer weekly and monthly discounts reflected in the final price. Note that this is optional, so not every listing will have this type of discount.

Be flexible

If possible, we always recommend being flexible with your travel dates. This booking strategy can save a lot of money because it opens up opportunities for traveling during cheaper periods, such as the off-season or during the week, rather than over a busy weekend.

Book stays with flexible cancellation policies

One of our biggest pet peeves when looking at Airbnb listings is seeing 48-hour cancellation policies. We would only have 48 hours to cancel for free, which doesn't work when we book things months in advance and don't know if our plans will change.

Instead, we filter for properties with flexible cancellation policies. This allows us to cancel closer to our trip if needed, but we also have the freedom to cancel and book something else if we find a better deal. Free cancellation policies are fantastic if you like finding last-minute deals from hosts.

FAQs about Airbnb credit cards

Does Airbnb have its own credit card?

No, Airbnb doesn't have its own credit card. However, Airbnb accepts multiple payment methods, including Visa, Mastercard, Discover, and American Express credit cards. You can also use Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal, or an Airbnb gift card.

What is the best way to pay for Airbnb?

Using a rewards credit card is an excellent way to pay for Airbnb stays if you want to earn cash back, points, or miles to help offset your purchase. Purchasing Airbnb gift cards with rewards credit cards and then using them for your stay is also possible.

Is there a way to get a discount on Airbnb?

Here are different ways to potentially get a discount on your next Airbnb stay:

Book a stay for a week or a month

Book a stay well in advance for an early bird discount

Book new properties

Book through an airline shopping portal

Book with a travel credit card that earns points or miles

Message the host and ask if there are any available discounts

Purchase discounted Airbnb gift cards and use those to book your stay

Is Airbnb considered travel for the Chase Sapphire Reserve?

Airbnb is typically considered a travel purchase for most credit cards, including the Chase Sapphire Reserve. That means you should be able to use the Sapphire Reserve's $300 annual travel credit toward an Airbnb stay. However, user reports indicate that longer Airbnb stays of 28 days or more could code differently.

How can I use credit card points to book an Airbnb stay?

You typically can't use credit card rewards to book an Airbnb or VRBO stay directly, but many rewards cards provide redemption options to book vacation rentals indirectly. For example, you can often redeem points for an Airbnb gift card, a statement credit, or a deposit into a bank account.

Our methodology

We compiled our list of the best credit cards for Airbnb by comparing the best cards from our existing rubrics for the travel, rewards, and cash-back categories. We also reviewed other credit cards that weren't included as the best cards in these categories but held high scores according to the factors in our rubrics.

From these lists and our research, we selected cards with valuable Airbnb redemption options, such as gift cards or statement credits, and travel rewards credit cards with elevated rewards rates. We selected different types of cards to show potential cardholders the wide range of available options, including travel and cash-back cards from different credit card issuers.

Our final list of the best Airbnb credit cards is based on our rubrics, research, experience, and expert opinion.

This article was edited by Rebecca McCracken
